caribbean.headline: Easterly swells and heavy rain in southern Lesser Antilles
caribbean.paragraph: St. Lucia is experiencing easterly swell-driven seas of 5.4 ft with 7 s periods and 12 kt winds, while Barbados reports 16 kt winds. I am monitoring persistent heavy showers across the southern Lesser Antilles with 100% rain probability and advise mariners to expect reduced visibility and choppy seas despite winds remaining below Small Craft Advisory thresholds.

mediterranean.headline: Northeast Swell Affecting Mykonos, Cadiz Reports 24 kt Winds
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing northeasterly swell with sustained winds around 21 kt, seas to 5.4 ft and a 6 s swell period; there is less than 10% rain probability. I am also watching Cadiz, where offshore winds reach 24 kt and mariners should prepare for brisk conditions and shortened, choppy nearshore seas.
